sub_goals.sub_goal: Build the self-contained app shell: page skeleton, locally-vendored CSS, flow orchestration (location -> lookup -> present), loading/status/error states, radius widening, startup guard.

acceptance_verification.evidence: Single browser-openable artifact; shell.js start() has a module-presence guard that renders an honest message instead of a blank/broken screen; no server required.
start() wires acquireLocation -> onResolved -> runLookup -> findNearbyLiquorStores -> renderClosestStore with no manual user wiring between steps.
showLoading/hideLoading drive #cls-loading during async work; setStatus surfaces ok/warn/error tones in #cls-status.
shell.css is fully self-contained (no CDN, no web fonts); integrated index.html inlines all CSS/JS; only outbound calls are Overpass + Nominatim.

contract_verification.evidence: Shell supplies #cls-location container and onResolved/onStatus callbacks; treats location as async.
Shell awaits findNearbyLiquorStores, routes ok/empty/error, owns the radius-widening retry schedule.
Shell passes userLocation, raw lookupResult, and #cls-result container to renderClosestStore; computes no distances itself.
